title: China's On-Device Large Model Makes Its Debut on Global Flagship Devices: MiniCPM by Mingshi is Integrated into Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Series
excerpt: Samsung unveiled the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip8 at the Galaxy Unpacked event in London last night. Just today, MinaCPM, a series o
content_html:
Samsung unveiled the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip8 at the Galaxy Unpacked event in London last night. Just today, MinaCPM, a series of edge-side large models from Minding Intelligence, has deeply empowered Samsung Galaxy AI - this is the first time a domestic edge-side large model has entered the global flagship product line of an international top smartphone manufacturer.

According to the introduction, this time Minding Intelligence provides Samsung Galaxy AI with edge-side model capabilities, covering text understanding and multimodal perception. The new devices that have truly adopted this "domestic brain" are the Galaxy Z Fold8 and Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra.

These two devices also have their own strengths. The Galaxy Z Fold8 features a new 4:3 ratio "wide fold" design, with an internal screen of 8 inches, dual 50-megapixel rear cameras, and a 4800mAh battery, completely moving away from the traditional narrow ratio of foldable screens, offering a visual and office experience closer to a tablet. The Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra is the first Ultra model in Samsung's foldable family, continuing the book-like fold design, equipped with a 200-megapixel main camera and a 5000mAh battery, firmly securing its position as the top of the foldable flagship segment.

sentences.zh: Galaxy Z Fold8采用全新4:3比例“宽折”设计，内屏为8英寸，后置双50兆像素摄像头，配备4800mAh电池，彻底摆脱传统窄比例折叠屏的束缚，提供更接近平板电脑的视觉和办公体验。

sentences.zh: Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra是三星可折叠家族中首款Ultra机型，延续了书本般的折叠设计，配备200像素主摄像头和5000mAh电池，牢牢坐稳了可折叠旗舰细分市场的巅峰地位。

content_html_zh:
三星昨晚在伦敦举行的 Galaxy Unpacked 活动上推出了 Galaxy Z Fold8、Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra 和 Galaxy Z Flip8。 就在今天，铭鼎智能系列边缘大机型MinaCPM深度赋能三星Galaxy AI——这是国产边缘大机型首次进入国际顶级智能手机厂商的全球旗舰产品线。

据介绍，Minding Intelligence此次为三星Galaxy AI提供了边缘侧模型能力，涵盖文本理解和多模态感知。 真正采用这个“国产大脑”的新设备是Galaxy Z Fold8和Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra。

这两种设备也各有优点。 Galaxy Z Fold8采用全新4:3比例“宽折”设计，内屏为8英寸，后置双50兆像素摄像头，配备4800mAh电池，彻底摆脱传统窄比例折叠屏的束缚，提供更接近平板电脑的视觉和办公体验。 Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra是三星可折叠家族中首款Ultra机型，延续了书本般的折叠设计，配备200像素主摄像头和5000mAh电池，牢牢坐稳了可折叠旗舰细分市场的巅峰地位。
